message:
feat(control): add Control renderable and control code helpers

Implement Python Rich's rich.control parity:

- Control renderable: emits terminal control sequences (cursor
  movements, clear screen, alt-screen, window title, etc.)
  via Segment objects with ControlCode payloads
- strip_control_codes(): removes Bell, BS, VT, FF, CR characters
  from text (mirrors rich.control.strip_control_codes)
- escape_control_codes(): replaces control chars with backslash
  escapes for safe display (mirrors rich.control.escape_control_codes)
- Both functions exported in prelude along with ControlCode,
  ControlType, and the Control renderable itself

138 lines in control.rs + 50 lines of helpers/tests in segment.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
